def: s.m. = A servant, slave, &c. ( = ćelā, q.v.). the first letter of the Arabic, Persian, and Urdū alphabets. Its pronunciation depends on the vowel which accompanies it; e.g. ا with fatḥa (اَ) = the Devanāgarī अ = the English a, as in cedar (or = the English u in fun); ا with kasra (اِ) = the Devanāgarī इ = the English i, as in fin; ا with ẓamma (اُ) = the Devanāgarī उ = the English u, as in bull. — ا with fatḥa, followed by ا, (i.e. اَا, which is usually written آ) = the Devanāgarī आ = the English ā, as in father; ا with fatḥa, followed by the letter و, (i.e. اَو) = the Devanāgarī औ = the English au (sounded like ou in house); ا with fatḥa, followed by the letter ي, (i.e. اَي), = the Devanāgarī ऐ = the English ai, as in aisle. — ا with ẓamma, followed by the letter و, (i.e. اُو), = 1˚, the Devanāgarī ऊ = the English u, as in rule (or = the oo in pool), and, 2˚, = the Devanāgarī ओ = the English o, as in pole. — ا with kasra, followed by ي, (i.e. اِي), = 1˚, the Devanāgarī ई = the English ī, as in caprice; and, 2˚, = the Devanāgarī ए = the French e, as in fête. ا is used, — 1˚ (arithmetically, according to the Abjad, q.v.) for the number one. 2˚ (for अ, in Almanacks and Astrology) for Sunday, and Aries. 3˚ (for अ) as a name of the god Vishnu. 4˚ as an inseparable prefix to a word beginning with a consonant, to signify negation or privation: e.g. aśuddha, 'impure,' 'incorrect.' As in Greek, a becomes an before a vowel; e.g. ananta, 'without end,' 'endless.'

v. n. 1. To sing, whistle, warble, chirp (as birds). 2. To chatter or talk in high spirits, cheerily, gaily, etc. 3. To rejoice; exult; make merry.

imp. verb. What should be. Must; should; necessary; requisite; required; desirable; due. Ashiq huë haiṅ āp bhī ek aur shakhs par, Ākhir sitam kī kuchh to mukāfāt chāhiye . Gālib. You 've thrown me off, your heart's given to another swain, Requital there must be—my bosom racked with pain. kyā na chāhiye , intj. 1. What dont I want; I want every thing. 2. Nothing is wanting; I have every thing.
n. m. 1. A burn. 2. A layer of stone and cement on a mud floor or roof; pavement. chahkā lagnā , v. n. 1. To be burnt (the skin). 2. To be paved.
more: s. m. 1. A kind of firework. The smarting of a wound, &c. by the applica tion of a medicine. چـﮩکالگانا chahkā lagānā, To burn the skin slightly by fomenting.

A large wooden peg (for tents, etc.) ( mekh ). 4. The hollow in which a pitcher, etc. is fixed. chahle kī bhaiṅs , n. f. lit . A buffalo wallowing in the mire. ( Met .) A fat lazy person.

v. a. 1. To wish; desire. 2. To like; love; to be enamoured of. 1. Mā chāhe beṭī ko, aur beṭī chāhe moṭe ḍhīṅg ko . Prov. The mother on her daughter doats, the daughter on her man robust. 2. Chāhiye achchhoṅ ko jitnā chāhiye; Voh agar chāheṅ to phir kyā chāhiye? Gālib. To win the hearts of good men is a duty meet, If too their love you gain your pleasure is complete. 3. Chāhne ke nām se gadhī ne bhī khet khānā chhoṛ dīyā . Prov. Even the she-ass was scared from her pasture when one talked to her of love. (Follow love and it will flee, flee love and it will follow thee). 3. To approve; choose. 4. To aim or aspire at or after; to pant for. 5. To intend; meditate; propose; offer to do. 6. To will; demand; call for; ask. Allāh chāhe so ho . Every thing happens as God wills.
dakh.) v. a. See چاهنا chāhnā.

ety: Prk. छइल्लो and छइल्ल ओ; S. छवि+इलः and इल+कः
def: adj. & s.m. Handsome, comely, beautiful; spruce, foppish, gay, dashing; — a handsome fellow a gay young spark, a fop, a beau, an exquisite, a coxcomb
more: n. m. S. छविल from छवि beauty. 1. A handsome, dashing youth ( albelā , n. 1, 2.). 2. A gay young fellow; a man of pleasure. 3. A swain; gallant; gay Lothario; Don Juan ( āshnā , 2). Dhobī kā chhailā ādhā ujlā, ādhā mailā . Prov. The washerman's buckish son, half clean, half dirty clothes has on. (He is rigged out from the clean and foul linen of his customers—a coat from one and pants from another). 4. A dandy; fop; coxcomb; an exquisite. Bāhar mīyāṅ chhail chikanyā, ghar meṅ libṛī joë! Prov. Abroad he cuts a dash all o'er the town, at home his wife see in a tattered gown. chhail-pan, chhail-gāī . See bāṅk-pan , and albelāpan , 3 to 6. Chāl bāṅkoṅ kī, pūt faqīrnī kā, dinoṅ shīrnī mol chukāī kare, Ghar khāne ko ās, na pās paisā, jhūṭ mūṭ kī shekhī, baṛāī kare, Karaj-dār phireṅ use bāṅdhne ko, āp galyoṅ meṅ chhail-gāī kare . Kabit. A beggar's son, he moves a swell, for sweets but bargainin…
s. m. A fop, a beau. چهيل پن chhail-pan, s. m. Spruceness.
s. m. (dakh.) A goat, he-goat ( Harris ).

more: n. m. S. छद a leaf. 1. A winnowing fan; a flat dish of basket-work used in winnowing or clearing grain. 1. Chhāj bole to bole, chhalnī bhī bolī jis meṅ bahattar sau chhed! Prov. The winnowing fan may speak if it will, but even the sieve with holes seven thousand and two hundred must give herself a tongue! (Where faults abound you hear the loudest sound). 2. Chhāj ṭūṭ-kar tulyāṅ niksīṅ, kaise nāj pachhoṛūṅ rī? Ab mat te kachh ban nahīṅ ātā, ke apnā sir phoṛūṅ rī . W. Rus. Wom. song. The winnowing fan to pieces worn, how shall I winnow now? In vain I beat my head—the grain I can't sift any how. 2. A cow-catcher. 3. A splash board. Baggī kā chhāj ṭūṭ gayā. chhājāīl' , adj. Having a long beard. chhājoṅ meṅh paṛnā, yā barasnā , v. n. To fall (torrents of rain).

v. a. 1. To enjoy throughly, or with great zest or gusto; to drain the cup of pleasure; to revel; to live while we live. 2. To spend like a prince; to spend every farthing. (The original is very expressive and comprehends, in one word, lavish expenditure for the sake of thorough and immediate enjoyment). Dil kī khushī kī khātir, chākh ḍāl māl dhan ko, Garmard hai to āshiq kauṛī narakh kafan ko . Nazīr. For the heart's delight spend free, in one draught all your wealth enjoy, If man you be and lover true for coffin not a sou lay by. Chhoṭī nandī rī, kuë pānī na jā! nainā lagā koī le jāëgā, Ānkhyāṅ torī nimbuā kī phaṅkyāṅ, nonā lagā koī chakh jāëgā . Wom. song. My tiny sister-in-law, go go not to the well, Eyes meeting eyes transfixed you're borne off by their spell! Your round eyes' zest, lime-halves with salt sucked in compel.
(from چخ) Begone, away, avaunt.

s. m. 1. The sixth (at cards, &c.). 2. A cage with a net attached to it. چهکا پنجه کرنا chhakkā panja karnā, To deceive, to play tricks.

wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀙𑀓𑁆𑀓 (chakka) + Middle Indo-Aryan -𑀓- (-ka-), from Sanskrit षट्क (ṣáṭka), but influenced by Northwestern Indo-Aryan, for which compare Punjabi چھکا (chakkā) and the other playing card numbers. *chākā would be the expected reflex in Urdu. Cognate with Nepali छक्का (chakkā).

def: v. n. 1. To depart this life. 1. Yā zāt meṅ kahāë, nāmī, asīl, zātī, Jamshaidfar ke pote, Naushervāṅ ke nātī, The āp misl-i-dūlah, aur fauj thī barātī, Jab chal base to koī nā suṅg thā na sāthī, Mulk o makāṅ, khazānā, lashkar huā to phir kyā? Nazīr. Be his high birth or caste, or holiness renowned and great, Naushervāṅ just his grandsire or Jamshaid of regal state, As bridegroom glad and gay, his force a wedding party wait, Alone this world hath left, companion none nor intimate, Nor kingdom, palace, treasure, armies then availed him aught. 2. Chal base jo log the islām ke! Rah gaë bāqī Musalmāṅ nām ke! Shahīd. Good Musalmen there were, but they have gone, The name alone's now left this earth upon. 2. To come to an end; to be over. Uskī chāhat n eṅ javānī apnī thī so chal basī . Inshā.

subs: adj. & s.m. Deceptive, false, feigning, artful, tricky; — a deceitful or tricky person, &c.

ety: ćhalak˚ = Prk. छलक्क(इ) or छलक्के(इ), fr. S. उद्+शल्+कृ
def: v.n. To be spilt; to overflow; to spill; to splash; — v.t. To fill to the brim
more: v. n. To splash; to be spilt; to spill. Haule bharūṅ merā bālak rove, jaldī chalūṅ merī chhalke gāgariyā . Wom. song. If at the well I slowly draw my child acrying keeps, if I walk fast the water in my pitcher makes a splash. chhalak'nā , v. a. To fill to the brim. Zarā kalsā chhalak denā .
v. a. 1. See chhulchhulānā . (3.). 2. To discharge semen.
(see چهلک chhalak ) v. n. To be spilt, to spill, to overflow.
v. a. To make water slowly (as, mares, &c. in heat).
subs: v.t. To fill to the brim.

def: part. adj. (f. -ī), Running over
s.m. Deceiving, deluding, tricking, cheating, outwitting; feigning (see ćhalnā).

ety: contrac. fr. S. उद्+शल्+लङ्घं; cf. ućhalnā
def: s.f. Skipping, jumping; skip, leap, spring, bound
more: n. f. See پهلانگ chhalāṅg'nā, chhalāṅg mārnā , v. n. See phalāṅgnā .
s. f. Skipping, jumping, a spring, skip, leap. چهلانگين مارنا chhalāngeṅ mārnā, To spring, to jump.
subs: (or ćhalāṅgeṅ) mārnā or ćhalāng bharnā, v.n. To skip, jump, spring, &c. ( = ćhalāṅgnā).

def: s.f. = ćhalāṅg, q.v. s.f. Skipping, jumping; skip, leap, spring, bound
subs: (or ćhalāṅgeṅ) mārnā or ćhalāng bharnā, v.n. To skip, jump, spring, &c. ( = ćhalāṅgnā).

def: v.n. = ćhalāṅgnā, q.v. v.n. To skip, jump, leap, spring, bound.
v.n. To skip, jump, leap, spring, bound.

adj. 1. About to depart, run away, or abscond. 2. Dying ( marne ko ); expiring; in extremis . Phr. At death's door; on one's death-bed; at the point of death; near one's end; death staring one in the face; having one foot in the grave; one's days being numbered. Woh ab chalan-hāroṅ meṅ haiṅ .
(from چلنا q. v.) adj. 1. Going. 2. Frail, inconstant, fickle. 3. On the point of death.
adj. (dakh.) in compos. Causing to move or go; impeller.
s.m. Ignis fatuus, will-o-th'-wisp
more: n. m. H. chhalnā , to deceive. Ignis fatuus ; will-o'th' wisp. Chhalāvā sā idhar udhar phirtā hai. chhalāvā ho jānā , v. n. 1. To disappear; vanish suddenly; decamp. 2. To elude search or pursuit.
subs: v.n. 'To turn into or be like a will-o-thʼ-wisp,' to vanish or disappear suddenly, to elude search or pursuit.

def: adj. 1. Disordered; disarranged; out of place. 2. Disjointed; out of joint; unhinged; ricketty. Gar ho Khudā na-khuāstah! ek kal bhī chal-bichal , Nazīr. Phir na khushī, na aish, na kuchh zindgī kā phal .
more: n. f. Displacement; disorganization; topsy-turvy; disarrangement; disorder; panic. Majlis meṅ chal-bichal ye paṛī tab khabar paṛī. chalpukār' , n. f. Hue and cry; shout.

def: s.f. Rustling or rippling sound; babble, murmur.

ety: fr. S. शल् or क्षल् = क्षर्, redupl.
def: v.n. To move with a rustling sound ( = sarsarānā); to make a rippling sound; to babble, to murmur; — to come off (as loose fæces) with a rumbling interrupted noise; — ćhulćhulānā, To make water slowly (as a mare, &c. in heat; cf. ćhulaknā)
more: v. a. To make water slowly (as, mares, &c. in heat).
subs: v.n. To move about making a rustling or rumbling noise; to flit about restlessly.

ety: ćhal(nā)+hāʼī = Prk. एअव्वअइओ (with h inserted) = S. (इ)तव्य+क+इकः (इन्+कः)
def: adj. Deceitful, tricky, &c. ( = ćhaliyā, q.v.). s.f. Betel-nut.
s.f. A small blister, &c.
adj. & s.m. Fraudulent, deceitful, false, perfidious, treacherous; artful, tricky; — a deceiver, cheat, trickster, betrayer, &c.
s.m. A song consisting of four parts and recited with certain gestures and gesticulation.
s.f. Betel-nut.
more: n. f. S. छटाफल Betelnut ( phāl ).
s. f. A kind of betel-nut.

def: adj. & s.m. Fraudulent, deceitful, false, perfidious, treacherous; artful, tricky; — a deceiver, cheat, trickster, betrayer, &c.
more: adj. Tricky; deceitful; fraudulent; false; treacherous; perfidious.
adj. Deceitful, fraudulent, artful, treacherous, false, perfidious, betrayer.

def: (caus. of ćhalaknā), v.t To cause to run over, to spill.
more: (trans. of چهلکنا chhalaknā ) v. a. To spill.

def: s.m. A plain ring (of gold, silver, or other metal, worn on a finger or toe)
more: n. m. 1. A ring. 2. A ring worn on the finger or toe. Chhallā de more tāīṅ . Hījṛās' song. Chhallā . 3. A kind of song sung by eunuchs at the birth of a child. 4. The title of the most popular Panjābī air. One of the verses sung to this air runs as follows. Chhallā raṅg baraṅgī, āyā Lāṭ Firangī, Udī men hai chaṅgī, balā, balā rāyā, chhallā ḍāḍā lāyā . Panj. chhalle-dār , adj. 1. Ringed ( annulata ); annular. 2. Articulate; vertebrate. 3. Greasy (broth). Chhalle-dār shurvā. tel kā chhallā , A drop of oil floating on a liquid. Niṅbū kā araq tel ke chhalle se ṭhahartā hai .
s. m. A ring (ornamental). چهلي دار chhalle-dār, adj. Annular.
s. m. A thin wiry metallick ring, commonly worn on the thumb or great toe.
subs: s.m. A game in which one of a party or side hides a ring in his hand, and one of an opposite party has to guess in whose hand the ring is
s.m. A ring consisting of three rings joined together, the two outer ones being plain, and the middle one having interstices
adj. Having rings; ringed, annular; — articulate; vertebrate; — having rings or spots of grease or oil on the surface (as soup, water, &c.), greasy.

def: s.m. A kind of song (usually sung by eunuchs on the occasion of the birth of a child); — name of an air or song (popular in the Panjāb).

ety: prob. a Prākr̤it form; cf. शल्कं and शल्लं
def: s.f. Skin; bark; rind, &c. ( = ćhilkā; cf. jhillī).
more: adj. Deceitful, fraudulent, artful, treacherous, false, perfidious, betrayer.

ety: ćhal˚ = Prk. छल(इ) or छले(इ) = S. छलय(ति), fr. the n. छल
def: v.t. To deceive, delude, trick, cheat, outwit, circumvent, impose on; to evade; to feign, pretend; to represent jalsely; to personate.
more: v. a. S. छल्लि+लू from छल्लि skin लू to cut. 1. To be peeled, husked, pared, shelled, excoriated, scraped. 2. To be erased, struck out, obliterated.
v. a. S. छल 1. To impose on; circumvent ( buttā denā , 1.). 2. To represent falsely; to personate.
v. a. To deceive, to cheat, to evade, to make excuses.
v. a. (dakh.) To excoriate, to flay, erase, obliterate, scrape, pare ( Harris ): see چهيلنا chhīlnā.

def: s.m. A strainer, a cloth through which anything is sifted (see ćhalnī).
s.f. An instrument for skinning or peeling.
s.f. A sieve, a strainer ( = ćhālnī, ćalnī); — adj. Battered
more: n. f. S. चालनी winnowing. A sieve; a strainer. chhalnī h. , v. n. 1. To have holes or to be pierced through like a sieve. 2. To be riddled, battered. Jinke naë naë the makāṅ aur mahal-sarā, Unkī chhateṅ ṭapaktī haiṅ chhalnī ho jā ba-jā . Nazīr.
1. adj. Battered. 2. s. f. (Sans. चालनी ) A sieve. چهلني کرنا chhalnī karnā, To batter.
subs: v.n. To be pierced or perforated, to be full of holes (like a sieve); to be riddled, be battered.

def: s. m. Motion.
s.f. Pardon, forgiveress, absolution; — forbearance, indulgence, favour, kindness
more: n. f. S. क्षमा patience, Pr. chhamā , or khamā . 1. Pardon; forgiveness; absolution. Chhimā karo, mahārāj! 2. Kindness; favour; good graces. Ham par apnī chhimā rakkho! chhimā-jog , adj. Venial; pardonable. chhimā k. , v. a. 1. To pardon. 2. To show kindness or favour.
s. f. Pardon, forgiveness, absolution. چهما جوگ chhimā-jōg, ( क्षमायोग्य ) adj. Venial. چهما کرنا chhimā karnā, To pardon, forgive, excuse.
subs: (-ko, and -par), To pardon, forgive, excuse; to show indulgence or kindness (to).

def: adj. Copper-coloured.
Photosphere. chamak-dār , adj. Shining; beaming; glittering. chamak-damak , n. f. Glitter; splendour.
s.m. An orphan, a fatherless son.
s. m. A flower-bed.
s. f. A bittern.
s. f. Slippers or shoes fixed to pattens.
s. m. (dakh.) 1. A shoemaker, &c. see چمار chamār. 2. See جلاد jallād.
s. f. The name of a flower. (Jasminum grandiflorum).
s.m. A kind of verse.

n. m. A spoon; a ladle. chamach-bozā , n. m. The spoonbill; platalea leucorodia . It is found throughout the greater part of Europe, Asia, Africa, and in some parts of America. It is spread all over India and breeds in July and August in large trees near tanks, laying elongated white eggs blotched with horn at the larger end. chamcha-bhar , A spoonful. chammach-chor , n. m. lit . One who steals a spoon. A table-servant; a kit. Sau bhaṛve mareṅ to ek chammach-chor paidā ho . Prov. A hundred bawds must die to make one spoon-thief. har-degī chamchah , n. m. One who sponges; a meddler; a libertine. cham'chī , n. f. A small spoon used to take out the lime, etc.
more: s. m. A spoon. چمچه بهر chamcha-bhar, adj. Spoonful. (Sans. चमस )

def: s.f. Sound of heavy rain; tinkle, jingle (of small bells, anklets, &c.), tinkle-tinkle.
n. f. Brightness ( jhalak ).
v.n. To sound (as falling rain); to tinkle, jingle.
v.n. To shine, glitter, flash, &c. ( = jhamjhamānā, q.v. v.n. To shine, sparkle, flash, glitter, dance (as light).
more: v. n. To tinkle (as small bells, etc); to sound, as heavy rain.
v. n. 1. To shine, to glitter. 2. To sound.

def: 1. adj. Lean, meagre. 2. s. m. A bat.
n. m. One who sticks like a leech. Terā ye ikhtilāt jāë ujaṛ! Kis qadar hai nigoṛā chamchichchaṛ! Wom. Shauq. Fell ruin seize such violent ravishment! How leech-like sticks the wretch incontinent!
n. m. A box; blow ( chāṅṭā ); a slap on the face.

v. a. 1. See chamaknā , (1, 2, 3.). 2. To make a show; show off; display; make famous. 3. To wave; brandish; flourish; shake (a stick, etc. at one). Sheftah, sādah-bayānī ne hameṅ chamkāyā, Varna sanat meṅ bahut log haiṅ behtar ham se . Sheftah. Sheftah, your simple language 'tis hath given you a name, In tropes and tricks of speech superiors many you might shame. 4. To excite; stir up; incite; spur. Zarā ghoṛe ko chamkā do .
more: (caus. of چمکنا) v. a. 1. To cause to glitter. 2. To provoke, to make to start, to startle. 3. To wave, brandish, flourish, brighten, burnish. 4. To display.

def: s. m. Glittering, splendour.
s. f. (dakh.) See چمکاهٿ chamkāhaṭ.
v.t. To pardon, forgive.
more: v. a. To pardon, to forgive.

def: n. m. chamoṭī , n. f. S. चर्म्म 1. A razor-strop. 2. A fool; blockhead. Tum bhī nire chamoṭe hī ho .
v. n. S. चप to go. To vanish; disappear ( bhāg jānā ). Chalo! champat ho!
v. n. See چمپت هونا champat honā.
v. n. To vanish, to disappear, to scamper off, to run away.
n. f. S. चर्मक 1. A piece of leather attached to a spindle. 2. ( Met .) A lean woman, all skin and bone.
more: s. f. 1. The apparatus of a spinning-wheel. 2. ( met. ) A lean woman.

def: s.f. Shade; shadow, reflection (of an object in a mirror, &c.)
more: n. f. S. छादन from छद to cover. A thatched and gabled structure ( chhappar ). Chhājā, bājā, kes, tīn Bangālā des, Chūnā, chūchī, dahī, tīn Bangālā nahīṅ . Prov. Famed is Bengal for thatch-roof, music, and long hair, But lime, good busts, or good fresh tyre you dont get there. 1. Mhārī ṭūṭī chhān chhavā balmā . Rus. song. 2. Uskī chhān par to phūṅs bhī nahīṅ . Not a straw on his thatched roof. (He is miserably poor). 3. Sāt chhān ke phūṅs se terā mūṅh phūṅk dūṅ . Wom. With seven roofs fired I'll burn your mouth. 4. Chhān kā ke ghar, aur meṅḍak kā ke ḍar? Rus. Prov. What boots a thatch roof slight, what fear can frogs excite?
s. f. A roof, a frame of bamboo for thatching.

def: s.f. A roof, a frame of bamboo for thatching, thatch; a thatched structure.

s.m. The hissing sound produced by a drop of water falling on a hot plate; — tinkle, jingle; clink, chink (of silver coin); — a bracelet (worn with ćūṛīs, the ćūṛīs being on each side and the ćhan in the middle); — gravel, grit (in grain or food; in this sense prob. fr. ćhannā).
more: n. m. 1. ( chhun, chhanākā ) The hissing sound produced by a drop of water falling on a hot plate; the tinkle of small bells; the chink of rupees. Gayā dil bhī chhin, gayā sīnā chhan, joṅhi bole chhun tere ghūṅgrū . My heart went snap, my breast pierced like a sieve, the tinkle of those tiny bells about your feet have ravished me. 2. (S. छिद् to break). Pebbles; gravel. Bājre meṅ baṛe chhan hote haiṅ . 3. A bracelet. Hin. Wom. 4. (Cor. of chhand ). A couplet repeated by a bridegroom at a wedding ceremony. Chhan pakāī, chhan pakāī, chhan pakke kā khurmā, Terī beṭī aise rākhūṅ āṅkhoṅ meṅ kā surmā! Song. Chhan . A verse I've made, a verse I've made, fried dates sweet, not the dry, Your daughter I will keep as eye-paint dear is to the eye. chhanī'lā , adj. Full of small pebbles.

n. m. S. क्षण, Pr. chhaṇam, khanam . The twinkling of an eye; a moment ( pal ); an instant. 1. Parvā pachhvā pavan chalat hai, baras paṛegī chhin meṅ, Bishan Dās pīyā ajhūṅ na āë, dāmnī damkan lāgī ghan meṅ . Birhā. Now East, now West wind blows, the threatening rain will instant fall, Another day my love away, fierce lightnings me appal. 2. Mere sāṅore salone se lāge haiṅ nain, Mohe kal nā paṛat ghaṛī, pal, chhin chain, Mere sāṅore salone se lāge haiṅ nain . Song. Ṭhumrī . My eyes caught with the bright-brown one, A moment's rest for me there's none, My eyes caught with the bright-brown one. chhin bhar meṅ, chhin meṅ , adv. In a moment; in an instant.
s. m. A moment or instant. چهن بدهنس chhin-bidhans ( क्षण विध्वंस ) adj. Fading, frail, passing away quickly. چهن بهرمين chhin bhar meṅ, In a moment.
s. A sound made by the falling of a drop of water upon a warm plate.

def: s.m. A couplet repeated by a bridegroom at a wedding ceremony.
s.f. Straining, sifting, &c. (used in comp.)
subs: s.f. = ćhān-binān, s.m. = ćhān-bīn, s.f. Sifting, close search, scrutiny, investigation; analysis; exploration
To make close search, to sift, to scrutinize, &c.

def: s.m. An instant, a moment, the twinkling of an eye
subs: (S. kshana-vidhwaṅsī), adj. Collapsing or perishing in a moment, passing or fading away quickly, frail
adv. In an instant or moment
s.m. A moment, an instant, a little while; — adv. In a moment.

ety: ćhā˚ = Prk. छाय(इ), or छाए(इ), or छाअ(इ), or छा(इ); S. छादय(ति), rt. छद्
def: v.t. To cover; to thatch, to roof; to shade; to spread; — v.n. To spread, be spread, be diffused; to swarm; — to be shaded; — to make a home (for oneself), to take up one's abode, to abide, tarry
more: v. a. 1. To thatch; shade; cover; roof. Yeh darakht khūb chhā rahā hai . This tree spreads out thick foliage (affords good shelter). 2. To overspread; overcast; overshadow. 1. Samāṅ chhā gayā . The scene is perfect. 2. Chehre pe murdanī chhā gaī . The shade of death is on him. 3. Raub chhā gayā . He was struck with awe. 3. To gather, lower (clouds). Abr chhā rahā hai. Gagan par chhā gaī kālī aṅdherī, Kaṭe kis taur se ab rain merī? Song. Birah . Black clouds hang o'er and darken all the sky, How shall I pass the long long nights for aye? 4. To tarry; loiter; take up one's quarters; make a home. Dakkhan gaë na bāoṛe, rahe Chaṅderī chhāë . Prov. He went to the South and ne'er came back, a home in Chanderī he has made. (Said of Alamgir's army which was before Chanderi for twelve years). chhav'iyā , n. m. A thatcher.
v. a. To thatch, to shade, to cover, to roof, to spread. چها جانا chhā jānā, To spread, to lie. چها لينا chhā lenā, To cloud, overspread, to overcast, darken.
subs: (-par), To spread (over), to cover; to lie; to cast a shadow (on or over), to overcast, overshadow
(-ko, or -par), To cover completely, to line; to cover, &c. ( = ćhā-jānā); to fill; to be heard on all sides or all along (a road); to swarm
(-ko), To cover completely, to overspread, overcast, cloud, darken.

def: s.m. Cakes of cowdung (usually placed on the thatch or roof to dry).

ety: Prk. छणक्को and छणक्कओ; S. छन˚+क+कः
def: s.m. = ćhan; jhan, jhan-kār, qq.v. s.f. Shade; shadow, reflection (of an object in a mirror, &c.)
more: s. The sound (hissing) of a drop of water falling on a hot plate, the sound of the breaking of earthen ware.

ety: Prk. छणक्को and छणक्कओ; S. छन˚+क+कः
def: s.m. = ćhan; jhan, jhan-kār, qq.v. s.f. Shade; shadow, reflection (of an object in a mirror, &c.)
Rheumatic pains.
v.t. = ćhanwānā, q.v. v.t. To cause to be strained, to have or get strained or sifted, &c.
more: v. a. To seize, snatch, pluck, &c. See چهينا chhīnnā.

def: (fr. ćhān-nā), s.f.(m.?), Chaff, husk.
s.m. & adv. Ringing sound, tinkle, jingle, clink, chink (of money); — tinkle-tinkle, clink-clink, chink-chink
s.f. Sounding, ringing, resounding; tinkling, tinkle, &c. ( = ćhanćhan); — tingling, smarting, smart.

ety: S. छनच्छन्न onomat.+ā = āw = Prk. आवे = S. आपि (caus. augment)+nā = Prk. अणअं = S. अनीयं
def: v.n. To sound, ring, tinkle, clink, chink (as money); to simmer; to sing (as a kettle); — to tingle, smart, pain (cf. jhanjhanānā).
more: v. n. 1. To chink; tinkle. 2. To smart; to pain.
v. n. 1. To simmer. 2. To sound, chink. 3. To smart, to pain.

def: s.f. Sickness, vomiting.
s.m. Deceit, fraud, dishonesty, trick, craft:-ćhand-band, s.m. Trickery, cheating, &c.
more: n. m. 1. A measure in verse or music. 2. Verse; poetry. chhand-chor; A. sāriq , n. m. A plagiarist. chhand-mātrā-gintī ; A taqtٴi , n. f. Scanning. chhand-mātrā ginnā ; A. taqtī k. , v. a. To scan.
1. ( छन्दः ) s. m. Measure of verses; a measure (in musick). 2. ( छन्द ) s. Meaning, intention, purport, opinion: wish, desire. adj. Solitary, secret, private.

def: adj. Concealed, hidden, clandestine, secret, private, solitary.

adj. & s.m. Praising, flattering; — appearance, look, shape; — wish, desire, pleasure, predilection; will; opinion; meaning, intention, purport, object; self-help; power, subjection; a composition in verse
subs: s.m. An ascetic in appearance only, a pretended or false ascetic; a pretender, a hypocrite.

def: s.m. A sacred hymn; the sacred text of the Vedic hymns; metrical science, prosody; poetical metre; a measure (in music)
subs: s.m. One who steals (another's) verses, a plagiarist
s.f. The measure or feet of verse
ćhando-ga, ćhandog, s.m. A reciter or singer in metre; a chanter of the Sāma Veda

def: s.f. Fastening, tether; trammel; net
more: s. f. A tether, a trammel, net.

def: s.m. Share, part (among faqīrs).
s.m. = ćhāṅdā, q.v. s.m. Share, part (among faqīrs).

n. m. S. चाण्डाल See pāpī . 1. An impure low caste; a Pariah; an outcaste. 2. A dom ; a man of the lowest Hindu caste. This caste follow the trade of mat-making, basket-making, etc. They have a monopoly of the ghāṭ where bodies are burned. 3. The offspring of a Brahman and a low caste woman; a mongrel; a man of mixed race. 4. A bastard. 5. A miser ( bakhīl ). 6. An executioner; a sinner ( pāpī ). 7. A villain; ruffian.

adv. So much; so many; as many as; as much as; how many soever; how much soever. chandāṅ zurūr nahīṅ . It is scarcely necessary, or not very necessary. chandāṅ muzāëqā nahīṅ , I have no objection; it is of no consequence; no matter.
s. (dakh.) A necklace or ornament for the neck.
adv. A while; a wee bit. chande bād . After some time; in due course.
adj. Deceitful, dishonest, tricky; — s.m. A deceiver, trickster, &c.
adj. Silvery, white.
n. f. Target practice. chāṅdan , n. f. The light fortnight.
v.t. To fasten, tie, bind, tether, trammel
more: v. a. To tether, to fasten, to tie, to bind.

ety: ćhāṅḍ˚ = Prk. छड्ड(इ) = S. छर्द(ति), rt. छृद्
def: v.n. To vomit, to spew; — to let go, to release, &c. ( = ćhoṛnā, q.v.).
more: v. a. 1. To let go, leave, abandon, loose, release, forsake, emit. 2. To vomit.

def: v.n. To be fastened, be tied, be bound, &c.
v.n. To vomit, &c. ( = ćhāṅḍnā).
more: v. a. (dakh.) To vomit, to spew ( Harris ): see چهانڐنا chhānḍnā, sign. 2.

def: v.n. To vomit, &c. ( = ćhāṅḍnā).
s.m. See s.v. ćhand, 'metre.' s.f. Fastening, tether; trammel; net
s.m. The doctrine of the Ćhando-gas or Udgātr̤i priests contained in a Brāhmaṇa of the Sāma-veda; — the Vedas in general.
